data.body: Remediated BLOCK review: replaced the G3/G4 container-harness extension with a dedicated prerequisite fidelity report and new opt-in eval; named and registered the prerequisite coverage contract; placed prerequisite_attribution_valid precisely as an na-default non-graded Binary veto; defined prompt isolation as captured-string absence checks; assigned record threading and completeness to plan_review_decide, the coverage flag to plan_review_coach, and unconditional unsigned INDETERMINATE escalation to orchestrator.finalize_verdict; added executable verification paths and defined tail-conflict.
